entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., an important grain legume nutritionally balanced for human consumption

entities.name: SEED PHYSICAL PROPERTIES
entities.description: Physical characteristics of seeds important for processing, storage, and assessing seed quality

entities.name: SEED HYDRATION PROPERTIES
entities.description: Properties related to the seed's ability to absorb water, affecting cooking quality

entities.name: SEED MORPHOLOGICAL TRAITS
entities.description: Traits including seed colour, shape, dots on seed coat, and surface texture

entities.name: SEED PHYSICAL TRAITS
entities.description: Traits including seed moisture content, 100-seed weight, seed coat content, length, width, thickness, geometric mean diameter, surface area, sphericity, shape aspect, volume, bulk density, true density, and porosity

entities.name: SEED HYDRATION TRAITS
entities.description: Traits including hydration capacity, hydration index, swelling capacity, and swelling index

entities.name: CHICKPEA MINI CORE COLLECTION
entities.description: A collection of 211 accessions and four control cultivars used for evaluation of seed traits

entities.name: SEED QUALITY
entities.description: The overall quality of the seed assessed through physical properties

entities.name: COOKING QUALITY
entities.description: The quality of the seed related to its hydration properties

entities.name: AGRONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: Traits related to the growth and productivity of the crop

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL TRAITS
entities.description: Traits related to the nutritional composition of the crop

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Biological stresses that the crop may be resistant to

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Non-biological stresses that the crop may be resistant to

entities.name: HIGH-YIELDING CULTIVARS
entities.description: Cultivars developed for high productivity with desirable seed physical and hydration quality
